title: Happier Happy Ghasts
description: Revives the original appearance of the Ghast and puts it on the Happy Ghast!
body:
# Happier Happy Ghasts

This texture pack revives the original appearance of the Ghast and Happy Ghast, which had a lower-resolution texture and a more familiar, lighthearted appearance.

![The Happy Ghast flying over cliffs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa2265ae358d9074d642816694750a13092326e9.jpeg)
